name: video_id
description: YouTube video ID extracted from source_url (e.g., 'abc123XYZ'). The de facto primary key of this table. Foreign key target for downstream tables (clips, hands, etc.).

name: source_url
description: Canonical YouTube URL for this video. Used to dedupe against the corpus manifest (YAML).

name: title
description: Video title fetched from yt-dlp at ingestion time.

name: duration_seconds
description: Video length in seconds, from yt-dlp.

name: gcs_path
description: GCS URI where the MP4 is stored (e.g., 'gs://bucket/abc123XYZ.mp4').

name: file_size_bytes
description: Size in bytes of the uploaded video file in GCS.

name: ingested_at
description: Timestamp when this row was written (i.e., when the video was successfully ingested). Auto-populated on insert via DEFAULT.
